changesRequestedReviews.author: architect
changesRequestedReviews.body: The overall design needs to be reconsidered. Please see my comments in the review summary above.

instructions: Decide for each item under `## Changes-requested reviews` whether a code change is warranted. **If any code changes are needed:** apply edits, commit, push. **If no code changes are needed:** no push is needed.

If you decide to push new commits: cancel each in-progress run listed under `## In-progress runs` before applying code fixes (e.g. `gh run cancel <id>`). Runs may complete between the tick and your action; treat cancellation errors on already-finished runs as non-fatal. Skip this step if you are only resolving threads without pushing — the existing runs remain relevant.
For each bullet under `## Changes-requested reviews` above: read the review body and apply the requested changes.

For any large decisions or rejections you made this iteration, run `pr-shepherd journal 42 '- <decision>'` to append an entry to the `## Shepherd Journal` section. For threads and comments, use the markdown link shown in its heading above; for reviews, reference the review ID. The command is idempotent — re-running with the same text is a no-op.
Stop this iteration — if you pushed new commits, CI needs time before the next tick; otherwise stop before the next tick.
